name: GEOFlow 21 GuanJian Insight
description: A warm editorial magazine variant with cream backgrounds, deep navy headings, serif titles and a terracotta accent color. Preserves GEOFlow frontend data contracts.
reference_site: 观见 (GuanJian Insight) content platform concept
notes: Generated from a user-supplied offline design mockup (观见 内容平台). Reproduces its color system and editorial layout using GEOFlow's real article/category/author data.
Keeps GEOFlow Blade variables, SEO meta fields, JSON-LD schema output, category navigation, article routes, and markdown HTML rendering intact.
The mockup's 'likes/comments/follow-author' interactions are not part of GEOFlow's public data contract and were omitted; visuals are limited to layout, typography and color.
